parameters.name: payload_json
parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ content:
($('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.priority === 5 ? '🔴 **' : '🟡 **') + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.object + ' — ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.cameraName + ' (' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.zone + ')**\n' +
'Time: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.formattedTime + ' · ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.formattedDate + '\n' +
'Confidence: ' + ($('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.score * 100).toFixed(0) + '%\n' +
'Clip: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.clipUrl + '\n' +
'Phone: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.hlsUrl + '\n' +
'Event: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.eventUrl
}) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ content:
'⚪ ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.object + ' — ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.cameraName + ' (' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.zone + ')\n' +
'Time: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.formattedTime + ' · ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.formattedDate + '\n' +
'Confidence: ' + ($('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.score * 100).toFixed(0) + '%\n' +
'Clip: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.clipUrl + '\n' +
'Phone: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.hlsUrl + '\n' +
'Event: ' + $('Parse & Filter Events').item.json.eventUrl
}) }}
